sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101792" key="sxali/dwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχᾰλίδωμα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n101792.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forked prop</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stay</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.19</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
